debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ ∑' (m : ↑(S₁ x)), (↑↑m)⁻¹ ≤ ∏ p ∈ ⌊x⌋.natAbs.primesBelow, ∑' (k : ℕ), (↑p ^ k)⁻¹

failed_attempts:
apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_tprod_sum_inv_powers]
        ext n
        simp only [S₁, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Nat.Prime, Int.ofNat_le, Int.ofNat_dvd,
          Int.ofNat_one, Int.ofNat_zero, Int.ofNat_succ, Int.ofNat_add, Int.ofNat_mul]
        constructor
        · intro h
          refine' fun p hp hpd ↦ _
          have := h p hp
          simpa [Int.ofNat_le] using this hpd
        · intro h
          refine' fun p hp hpd ↦ _
          have := h p hp hpd
          simpa [Int.ofNat_le] using this

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_tprod_sum_inv_powers]
        ext n
        simp only [S₁, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Nat.Prime, Int.ofNat_le, Int.ofNat_dvd,
          Int.ofNat_one, Int.ofNat_zero, Int.ofNat_add, Int.ofNat_mul]
        constructor
        · intro h
          obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := h
          exact fun p hp hpd ↦ by
            have := h p hp hpd
            simpa [Int.ofNat_le] using this
        · intro h
          use n
          tauto

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_tprod_sum_inv_powers]
        ext m
        simp [S₁, Nat.Prime, Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, Int.ofNat_le]

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_tsum_subtype]
        refine' tsum_mul_support _

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_prod_tsum_primes]
        simp [S₁, primesBelow, Nat.prime_iff]

have hS : S₁ x = { n | ∀ p, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ n → p ≤ ⌊x⌋₊ } := by
          ext n
          simp [S₁, Nat.floor_eq_iff, hxge, hxlt]
        rw [hS]
        exact by
          apply le_of_eq
          rw [Real.tsum_eq_tprod_sum_inv_powers]
          rfl

apply le_of_eq
        rw [tsum_eq_sum_tsum_S₁]

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_prod_tsum_of_summable_of_nonneg]
        · intro p hp
          exact summable_geometric_of_norm_lt_1 (by norm_num)
        · intro m hm
          simp only [S₁, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hm
          refine' Nat.factors_subset_of_forall_prime_dvd (fun q hq hd ↦ _)
          specialize hm q hq hd
          exact_mod_cast le_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_of_le (Nat.floor_le (le_of_lt (show 0 < x from by linarith))))
        · intro p hp
          positivity

have hS : S₁ x = { n | ∀ p, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ n → p ≤ ⌊x⌋₊ } := by
          ext n
          simp [S₁, Nat.floor_eq_iff, hxge, hxlt]
        rw [hS]
        exact le_of_eq (EulerProduct.euler_product_real (⌊x⌋₊))

apply le_of_eq
        rw [tsum_eq_sum_single]
        · ext m
          simp only [S₁, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Nat.Prime, Nat.succ_le_iff, not_lt_zero,
            Nat.cast_nonneg, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_pow]
          intro h
          have hm : m ≠ 0 := by
            rintro rfl
            simp_all
          have : ∀ p, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ m → p ≤ x := h
          have : ∀ p, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ m → p ≤ ⌊x⌋₊ := by
            intro p hp hpm
            exact_mod_cast le_floor.mpr (this p hp hpm)
          exact Nat.factors_subset_of_forall_prime_le this
        · intro i hi
          simp_all

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_prod_tsum_primes (S₁ x) (by simp [S₁, Nat.Prime])]

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_prod_tsum_primes (S₁ x)]
        congr
        ext n
        simp [S₁, Nat.Prime, dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, Int.ofNat_le]

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_prod_tsum_primes (S₁ x) (by
          intro m hm
          have := hm
          simp only [S₁, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at this
          intro p hp hpd
          exact_mod_cast this p hp hpd)]

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_tprod_sum_inv_powers]
        ext n
        simp [S₁, Nat.Prime, primesBelow, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Int.ofNat_le, Int.ofNat_lt,
          Int.natAbs_ofNat, Nat.floor_eq_iff, hxge, hxlt]

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_prod_tsum_primes (S₁ x) (by
          intro m hm
          have hx_nonneg : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
          have h_floor : ⌊x⌋₊ = ⌊x⌋.natAbs := by
            simp [Nat.floor_eq_natAbs]
          rw [h_floor] at *
          intro p hp hpm
          exact hm p hp hpm)]

have hS : S₁ x = { n | ∀ p, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ n → p ≤ ⌊x⌋₊ } := by
          ext n
          simp [S₁, Nat.floor_eq_iff, hxge, hxlt]
        rw [hS]
        exact le_antisymm
          (by
            apply tsum_le_tsum_of_nonneg
            · intro m _
              positivity
            · intro m
              simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Nat.floor_eq_iff, hxge, hxlt]
              intro h
              refine' le_of_not_gt fun h' => _
              obtain ⟨p, hp, hpd, hpg⟩ := exists_prime_and_dvd (Nat.pos_of_mem_factors (Nat.factors_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by rintro rfl; simp_all))))
              have hpx := h p hp hpd
              linarith)
          (by
            apply tsum_ge_tsum_of_nonneg
            · intro m _
              positivity
            · intro m
              simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Nat.floor_eq_iff, hxge, hxlt]
              intro h
              refine' le_of_not_gt fun h' => _
              obtain ⟨p, hp, hpd, hpg⟩ := exists_prime_and_dvd (Nat.pos_of_mem_factors (Nat.factors_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by rintro rfl; simp_all))))
              have hpx := h p hp hpd
              linarith)

have hS : S₁ x = { n | ∀ p, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ n → p ≤ ⌊x⌋₊ } := by
          ext n
          simp [S₁, le_floor_iff]
        rw [hS]
        apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.sum_over_multiplicative_set]
        · rfl
        · intro p hp
          exact (primesBelow_iff_prime_le _).mp hp

apply le_of_eq
        rw [tsum_eq_sum_tsum_S₁]

apply le_of_eq

        simp [S₁, primesBelow, Nat.prime_def_lt']

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_tprod_primes]
        simp [S₁, primesBelow, Nat.prime_iff]

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_tprod_sum_inv_powers]
        ext n
        simp [S₁, Nat.Prime, primesBelow, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Int.ofNat_le, Int.ofNat_lt]
        constructor
        · intro h
          obtain ⟨p, hp, hpd, hpx⟩ := h
          refine ⟨p, ?_, hpd, ?_⟩
          · exact Nat.Prime.ne_zero hp
          · exact_mod_cast hpx
        · intro h
          obtain ⟨p, hp, hpd, hpx⟩ := h
          refine ⟨p, hp, hpd, ?_⟩
          exact_mod_cast hpx

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_tprod_sum_inv_powers]
        ext n
        simp only [S₁, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Nat.Prime, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range,
          Nat.lt_succ_iff, Nat.cast_le, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, add_comm]
        constructor
        · intro h
          refine' ⟨fun p hp hpd ↦ _, fun p hp hpd ↦ _⟩
          · exact (h p hp hpd).trans (by simpa using Nat.floor_mono hxge)
          · exact (h p hp hpd).trans (by simpa using Nat.floor_mono hxge)
        · intro h
          refine' fun p hp hpd ↦ _
          have := h.1 p hp hpd
          simpa [Nat.floor_le] using this

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_tsum_mul_pow_inv_primesBelow]

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_tprod_sum_inv_powers]
        ext n
        simp only [S₁, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Nat.Prime, Int.ofNat_le, Int.ofNat_dvd, Int.ofNat_one,
          Int.ofNat_zero, Int.ofNat_succ, Int.ofNat_add, Int.ofNat_mul, Int.ofNat_sub,

        constructor
        · intro h

        · intro h
          exact fun p hp hpd ↦ h p hp (by simpa using hpd)

        rw [Real.tsum_eq_tprod_primesBelow_inv_pow]

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_prod_tsum_inv_pow_primes (S₁ x) (by

          exact fun p hp hpm => Nat.cast_le.mpr (hm p hp hpm))]

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_prod_tsum_of_summable_primes]
        exact fun p hp ↦ summable_geometric_of_norm_lt_1 (by norm_num)

        rw [Real.tsum_eq_prod_tsum_inv_pow_primes (S₁ x)]
        congr
        ext n
        simp [S₁, Nat.Prime, ← Int.ofNat_le]
        constructor
        · intro h
          obtain ⟨p, hp, hpd, hpx⟩ := h
          exact ⟨p, hp, hpd, by simpa using hpx⟩
        · intro h
          obtain ⟨p, hp, hpd, hpx⟩ := h
          exact ⟨p, hp, hpd, by simpa using hpx⟩

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_tprod_sum_inv_powers]
        ext n
        simp [S₁, Nat.Prime, primesBelow, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Icc, Nat.succ_le_iff,

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_prod_tsum_primes]
        congr
        ext p
        simp [Nat.Prime, S₁, mem_primesBelow, Nat.le_of_lt_succ, hxge, hxlt]

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_prod_tsum_primes]
        congr
        ext p
        simp [Nat.Prime, S₁, mem_primesBelow, Nat.le_of_lt_succ, hxge, hxlt]

apply le_of_eq
        rw [Real.tsum_eq_prod_tsum_primes (S₁ x) (by
          intro m hm
          have hx_nonneg : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
          have h_floor : ⌊x⌋₊ = ⌊x⌋.natAbs := by
            simp [Nat.floor_eq_natAbs]
          rw [h_floor] at *
          exact fun p hp hpm => by
            have hpx : p ≤ x := hm p hp hpm
            have hpnat : p ≤ ⌊x⌋.natAbs := by
              apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
              rw [Nat.lt_succ_iff]
              exact mod_cast hpx
        )]
